Business Hub Executive Analytics Platform

Reusable upload model for CEO/CFO sales, profit, customer, product, and region analytics.

CSV works offline. Excel upload uses the included XLSX browser library.

Executive Summary

Sales & Profitability Performance

SalesProfitLoss/Risk

Monthly Sales and Profit Trend

Shows monthly revenue and profitability movement with readable axes.

Sales vs Profit by Order

Each point is an order; useful for margin outlier detection.

Sales by Region

Ranked regional revenue contribution.

Profit by Region

Positive and negative profitability by region.

Profit Margin by Category

Margin percentage by product category.

Customer, Product & Risk Analysis

Top Customers by Sales

Largest revenue contributors.

Top Customers by Profit

Most profitable customers after cost and shipping.

Category Performance

Sales and profit comparison by product category.

Customer Segment Performance

Sales by customer segment.

Pareto Analysis

Cumulative customer revenue contribution; highlights concentration risk.

Product Health Matrix

Sales vs margin by subcategory. Upper-right = strongest products.

Actual vs Budget Sales

Monthly comparison against budget sales.

Simple Sales Forecast

Linear trend forecast for next three months.
